name: Mixpanel
description: Mixpanel is a product analytics platform for tracking user interactions. Import events, query segmentation, funnels, and retention data, manage user profiles and cohorts, and export raw event data.

capabilities.name: events_track
capabilities.description: Send a single event to Mixpanel for real-time tracking.

capabilities.name: events_import
capabilities.description: Batch import historical events with validation and per-event error reporting.

capabilities.name: profiles_set
capabilities.description: Set properties on a user profile, creating it if it does not exist.

capabilities.name: profiles_set_once
capabilities.description: Set profile properties only if they have not been set before.

capabilities.name: query_segmentation
capabilities.description: Query event segmentation data with filtering, grouping, and time bucketing.

capabilities.name: query_funnels
capabilities.description: Analyze a conversion funnel with multiple steps.

capabilities.name: query_retention
capabilities.description: Get user retention data over time periods.

capabilities.name: query_engage
capabilities.description: Query user profiles with property filters and pagination.

capabilities.name: cohorts_list
capabilities.description: List all saved cohorts in the project.

capabilities.name: events_export
capabilities.description: Export raw event data for a date range.

capabilities.name: groups_set
capabilities.description: Set properties on a group profile.
